pageContext.name: Godzilla 2016 (4th Form)
pageContext.description: Gigantic Series x DefoReal - a dream combo for any collector!  The fourth form of Godzilla (2016), the first of the DefoReal series, is making its return in a GIGANTIC way! The DefoRealversion has been completely remodeled, all while being packed with a massive amount of detail that you'd see in the Gigantic series! Enjoy this larger and more richly detailed fourth form of Godzilla (2016), made from the ground up with maximum detail by a sculpting master.   Based on the design of the first series but modified to maintain the balance one would see in a Gigantic version, this Godzilla Collectible Figure is one you don't want to miss out on!
